features.subtitle: From analysis to industrialisation, we cover the full value chain of your digital solutions.

features.f1.desc: RPA, AI-driven workflows and orchestration of your business tools, to free your teams from low-value work.

features.f2.desc: Web portals, intranets and SaaS platforms tailored to your operations.

features.f3.desc: Turn-key web and mobile apps, from prototype to production-grade.
features.f4.title: Digital transformation
features.f4.desc: Advisory, strategic scoping and change management to anchor digital in your company culture.
process.desc: Every project follows a clear chain: capture, model, automate, measure. No black box, no inertia, just a mastered pipeline.

process.s3.title: Development & integration
process.s3.desc: Agile builds, continuous integration and connection to your existing systems.
process.s4.title: Deployment & support
process.s4.desc: Secure rollout, monitoring and continuous improvement.

services.hero.title.full: Sharp technical expertise that delivers ✳
services.hero.subtitle.full: From process automation to connected ecosystem integration, we cover the entire digital value chain, with measurable results.
services.s1.title: Process Automation
services.s1.desc: Automation of manual tasks, RPA, custom N8n / Zapier workflows and orchestration across your business tools.
services.s2.title: Web & Mobile Apps
services.s2.desc: Design and development of high-performance, scalable applications tailored to your users.
services.s3.title: System Integration
services.s3.desc: Reliable connection of your ERPs, CRMs, third-party tools and databases via robust, secure APIs.
services.complementary.c1.title: AI & Data
services.complementary.c1.desc: Model integration, conversational agents, scoring and forecasting.
services.complementary.c2.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.complementary.c2.desc: Infrastructure, CI/CD, monitoring and managed hosting.
services.complementary.c3.title: Digital advisory
services.complementary.c4.title: Support & maintenance
services.complementary.c4.desc: Corrective and evolutive maintenance of your applications.
services.process.s1.title: Discovery
services.process.s1.desc: Scoping workshop and understanding of your business challenges.
services.process.s2.title: Design
services.process.s2.desc: Mockups, architecture, technical choices and action plan.
services.process.s3.title: Build
services.process.s3.desc: Iterative sprints with regular demos and user testing.
services.process.s4.title: Run
services.process.s4.desc: Deployment, continuous support and data-driven optimisation.

solutions.hero.title.full: Field-tested solutions, delivered to our clients ✳
solutions.hero.subtitle.full: Overview of the business challenges we solve daily: HR, operations, data-driven decisions.
solutions.rh.desc: Digital onboarding, automated leave management, payslip generation, electronic signatures and interview tracking — all in one unified portal.
solutions.inv.desc: Multi-warehouse tracking, threshold alerts, ERP synchronisation, and mobile barcode / QR for your field teams.
solutions.inv.alert: Module M-410 below critical threshold — restock suggested
solutions.dash.desc: Centralise your sales, financial and operational KPIs. Dashboards plugged into your data sources, updated in near real-time.

solutions.cta_final.title.full: Your case isn't listed? Let's build it together.
about.hero.title.full: A Moroccan team, with global ambitions ✳
about.hero.subtitle.full: DELTIXIA was born from a simple belief: digital transformation should not be a luxury. Accessible, measurable, sustainable.
about.mission.title: Our mission
about.mission.desc: Help Moroccan SMEs and large companies transform their daily processes into smooth, measurable, automatable digital flows — so they can focus their energy on what really creates value.
about.vision.title: Our vision
about.vision.desc: Become the leading technology partner in North Africa for smart automation, combining engineering excellence, human closeness and a results-driven culture.
about.values.title.full:
Four principles that guide
every project
about.values.v1.title: Innovation
about.values.v1.desc: Constant watch on emerging technologies — AI where it truly makes a difference.
about.values.v2.title: Performance
about.values.v2.desc: Every deliverable produces measurable impact: time saved, conversions, data quality.
about.values.v3.title: Reliability
about.values.v3.desc: Tested code, monitored infrastructure, verified backups: robustness is non-negotiable.
about.values.v4.title: Partnership
about.values.v4.desc: We work with your teams, not in their place. Success means a long-term relationship.
about.approach.desc: Short phases, functional deliverables every sprint. You see your solution progress week after week — no surprises, no tunnel effect.
about.timeline.y1.title: Birth of DELTIXIA
about.timeline.y1.desc: Founded in Rabat with a team of 5 engineers convinced that automation can be accessible.
about.timeline.y2.title: First 10 projects delivered
about.timeline.y2.desc: First contracts with Moroccan SMEs — HR automation, invoicing, operational dashboards.
about.timeline.y3.title: Launch of the AI & Data unit
about.timeline.y3.desc: Team strengthened with 8 new talents to support artificial intelligence projects.
about.timeline.y4.title: +50 companies supported
about.timeline.y4.desc: 15+ certified experts and a roadmap focused on AI applied to business processes.
about.timeline.y4.label: 2026 · today
about.cta.desc: Tell us your context and your goals, we'll propose a concrete approach.
